certificate.caveat: When installed, initialized and configured as specified in Section 11of the Security Policy. When operated in approved mode
certificate.description: mToken CryptoID is designed based on a secure smartcard chip that utilizes the in-built mCOS to communicate with Computer device via USB interface in a "plug and play" manner. It can realize various Public Key Infrastructure (PKI) applications including digital signature, online authentications, online transactions, software security, etc.

vendor.name: Century Longmai Technology Co. Ltd
